company.name: AI4comms
company.description: AI4comms helps communications leaders turn AI from abstract hype into practical advantage through strategy, training, governance, and hands-on implementation support.

services.name: AI Strategy for Communications Teams
services.description: Strategic advisory for communication leaders who need to define where AI creates real value across corporate communications, public affairs, media relations, and content operations.

services.name: AI Training and Team Enablement
services.description: Practical training programs that help communications teams adopt AI tools responsibly, improve workflows, and build confidence without drowning in jargon.

services.name: Governance and Responsible AI for Comms
services.description: Policy, governance, and operating-model support for organizations that need to use AI in communications without creating reputational, legal, or workflow risk.

services.name: Executive AI Advisory
services.description: Senior advisory support for leaders who need a clear view on how AI is reshaping communications functions, stakeholder expectations, and team structures.

publicModels.name: Advisory Retainer or Project Fee
publicModels.description: Used for strategic advisory, governance work, and executive support. Pricing depends on scope, access, and pace.

publicModels.name: Workshop and Enablement Fee
publicModels.description: Used for training sessions, team enablement, and playbook development. Pricing depends on team size and preparation required.
